core.name: CA. Raghavan
core.bio: Lead coach and author at FA. CA Raghavan brings 25 years of international service in accountancy and taxation. He has authored FA's proprietary study materials and has mentored multiple state-rank holders.

core.name: CA. Achuthaan
core.bio: A dual-qualified CA and CS, Achuthaan brings a uniquely comprehensive perspective to financial topics. His teaching style bridges theory and real-world application across audit and finance management.

core.name: CA. Shruthilaya
core.bio: Shruthilaya specialises in Business and Corporate Law, delivering complex legal concepts with clarity and student-friendly frameworks. Her exam-focused approach has produced strong Paper 2 results.

core.name: Mrs. Elavarasi
core.bio: A versatile educator with post-graduate expertise across commerce subjects. Mrs Elavarasi is known for her systematic, student-first teaching approach and strong student relationships.

core.name: Mrs. Ambika
core.bio: With over a decade at FA, Mrs Ambika's clarity and patience make complex accounting and economics topics accessible to students at every starting level.

core.name: Ms. Harini
core.bio: Technology and accounting software specialist. Ms Harini runs FA's practical Tally and Busy programs with hands-on lab sessions that directly translate to workplace readiness.

core.name: Ms. Padmini
core.bio: With an MS from the United States, Ms Padmini brings a global perspective to professional communication. Her sessions equip students for interviews, presentations, and professional correspondence.

core.name: Ms. Mukkani
core.bio: FA's wellness anchor. With 15+ years of practice, Ms Mukkani leads meditation and yoga sessions that prepare students mentally for the demands of CA examinations.

core.name: Mr. Dilip Radhakrishnan
core.bio: A dedicated mathematics educator whose structured approach to quantitative aptitude and statistics has helped hundreds of students overcome their fear of Paper 3.
